name: Chewy Coconut Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Vanilla extract or almond extract
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :35
Preheat oven to 350°F. Cream butter and 1/4 cup sugar until light and fluffy. Stir in 1/2 cup flour. Pour into a greased 8 x 8" pan and bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. (You may have to press it out to a thin layer.)
Meanwhile, mix remaining 1/4 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, salt, vanilla extract, egg, nuts, and coconut. Spread evenly over baked dough. Bake an additional 20-25 minutes or until golden. While warm, cut into squares.
